description: Letter from the office of Yehoshua Maimonides (b. 1310–d. 1355 CE) to a certain Avraham ha-Sar (likely the same addressee as in T-S 8J40.2) regarding an excommunication. Muslim courts are mentioned. Needs further examination.
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-14. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
